titel: 2025 Report for Companies with State Ownership.
html:
In the document, the government provides an overview of the management of the state's ownership in companies and the operations of the companies managed by the Government Offices at the turn of the year 2024/25. The document also covers the activities of the Swedish Ship Mortgage Bank, the Industrial Foundation, and the Northern Foundation.

The government also provides an account of the sales of Svensk Bilprovning AB and Lernia AB.

In the document, the government also outlines the new ownership policy that the government decided on February 20, 2025, and the changes that the government intends to make in the operational reports for companies with state ownership in the coming years.
